expectations.text: Script contains a model create command
expectations.evidence: Found: 'model create model_name = pendulum' (with line continuation '&')

expectations.text: A rigid body part is created with part create rigid_body name_and_position
At least one marker is created on the link and at least one on ground
A revolute joint is created using constraint create joint revolute with i_marker_name and j_marker_name
expectations.evidence: Found: 'constraint create joint revolute joint_name = .pendulum.pin_joint i_marker_name = .pendulum.link.pivot_link j_marker_name = .pendulum.ground.pivot_ground'

expectations.text: Gravity is created with force create body gravitational (not force create body_force or any other variant)
expectations.evidence: Used 'environment set gravity gravity_x = 0.0 gravity_y = -9806.65 gravity_z = 0.0' — this is the WRONG command. The correct command is 'force create body gravitational'

expectations.text: Initial orientation set to 45 degrees for the release angle
expectations.evidence: Part created with location = 70.711, -70.711, 0.0 which is the CM position at 45 degrees (100 mm from pivot at 45°). However, orientation = 0.0, 0.0, 45.0 lacks the 'D' degree suffix.

expectations.text: All keywords spelled out fully (no abbreviations)
expectations.evidence: Keywords appear spelled out fully; 'environment set gravity' is wrong command but not an abbreviation issue

expectations.text: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: Found: 'adams_id = 2' on the part create command — manually specified ID violates Core Rule #8

expectations.text: Mass properties are set with part modify rigid_body mass_properties (not part create rigid_body mass_properties)
expectations.evidence: Found: 'part create rigid_body mass_properties part_name = .pendulum.link' — incorrectly uses 'part create' instead of 'part modify' for mass properties

expectations.text: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log (validated by scripts/run_adams_cmd.py)
expectations.evidence: Not validated — without_skill script uses 'environment set gravity' (non-existent command), 'part create rigid_body mass_properties' (wrong), and 'adams_id = 2' (forbidden). Multiple errors expected in Adams View.
